title: Develop an instrumentation strategy
summary: Develop an effective instrumentation strategy through logging, telemetry, and monitoring and prepare for Exam AZ-400: Designing and Implementing Microsoft DevOps Solutions.

lessons.title: Control and organize Azure resources with Azure Resource Manager

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Operational Excellence

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop an instrumentation strategy
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop an instrumentation strategy**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
